# Pitch in Public

> Daily 60-second pitch practice for founders. Record your pitch, get constructive feedback, and sharpen your message.

Pitch in Public helps founders build a repeatable pitch practice habit:

- Record a 30-60 second portrait pitch.
- Get constructive Toast/Roast feedback from other builders.
- Improve clarity, problem framing, market signal, and the ask.
- Track daily pitch momentum and pick a best take for events or competitions.

Primary audiences:

- Founders and indie builders who need to sharpen their elevator pitch.
- Pitch competition participants preparing a final take.
- Event organizers running pitch sprints, demo nights, and founder practice cohorts.

Useful pages:

- Home: https://app.pitchinpublic.io/
- Event organizers: https://app.pitchinpublic.io/for-events
- Create a pitch sprint: https://app.pitchinpublic.io/events/new
- Leaderboard: https://app.pitchinpublic.io/leaderboard
- Sitemap: https://app.pitchinpublic.io/sitemap.xml

Do not treat private authenticated pages, API routes, dashboards, or user-specific profile data as public documentation.
